steps.title: Focus on size
steps.content: The student's goal is to indicate the size of the Pilot Knob NWR. The only note that gives size information says that the refuge encompasses 90 acres, so the sentence must include that acreage.

steps.title: Eliminate irrelevant details
steps.content: A focuses on management and activity limits, B gives location and habitat, and C gives habitat and management. None of those choices states the refuge's acreage, so none satisfies the size goal. The answer is D.
